answer_facts.label: Spaniard Fray Tomás de Berlanga, the fourth Bishop of Panama, discovers the Galápagos Islands by chance on his way to Peru.

vector_metadata.text_for_embedding: Spaniard Fray Tomás de Berlanga, the fourth Bishop of Panama, discovers the Galápagos Islands by chance on his way to Peru.

answer_facts.label: Roman Emperor Maximian concludes his campaign in North Africa and makes a triumphal entry into Carthage.

vector_metadata.text_for_embedding: Roman Emperor Maximian concludes his campaign in North Africa and makes a triumphal entry into Carthage.

answer_facts.label: Ethiopian Airlines Flight 302, a Boeing 737 MAX, crashes shortly after take off, killing all 157 passengers and crew. This and the prior Lion Air Flight 610 led to all 387 Boeing 737 MAX aircraft being grounded worldwide.

vector_metadata.text_for_embedding: Ethiopian Airlines Flight 302, a Boeing 737 MAX, crashes shortly after take off, killing all 157 passengers and crew. This and the prior Lion Air Flight 610 led to all 387 Boeing 737 MAX aircraft being grounded worldwide.

answer_facts.label: After establishing the city of Santo Domingo, Christopher Columbus departs for Spain, leaving his brother in command.

vector_metadata.text_for_embedding: After establishing the city of Santo Domingo, Christopher Columbus departs for Spain, leaving his brother in command.
